name: Amethyst
description: A violet variety of quartz long revered as a stone of spiritual protection and purification. It calms the mind, enhances intuition, and supports meditation by opening higher states of consciousness.
affirmation: I trust my intuition and open myself to higher wisdom.
cautions: May fade in prolonged direct sunlight

name: Clear Quartz
description: Known as the master healer, clear quartz amplifies energy, intention, and the effects of other crystals. It brings clarity of thought and purpose, acting as a programmable stone that adapts to the holder's needs.
affirmation: I am clear in my purpose and amplified in my intention.

name: Rose Quartz
description: The stone of unconditional love, rose quartz opens the heart to all forms of love: romantic, familial, and self-directed. Its gentle pink energy soothes emotional wounds and encourages compassion and forgiveness.
affirmation: I am worthy of love and I give love freely.
cautions: May fade in prolonged direct sunlight

name: Citrine
description: A golden-yellow quartz that carries the warmth and energy of the sun. Citrine is celebrated as a stone of abundance, personal will, and creative manifestation, never holding or accumulating negative energy.
affirmation: I attract abundance and radiate confidence.
cautions: Heat-treated amethyst is often sold as citrine; natural citrine is pale yellow

name: Black Tourmaline
description: One of the most powerful protective stones, black tourmaline creates an energetic shield against negative energies, electromagnetic pollution, and psychic attack. It grounds spiritual energy into the physical body and promotes a sense of security.
affirmation: I am protected, grounded, and secure in my being.

name: Labradorite
description: A feldspar mineral famous for its iridescent play of color known as labradorescence. Labradorite is a stone of transformation and magic, protecting the aura while raising consciousness and strengthening faith in the self.
affirmation: I embrace transformation and trust in my own magic.

name: Moonstone
description: A luminous stone with an ethereal glow that evokes the energy of the moon. Moonstone enhances intuition, promotes inner growth, and harmonizes cycles, making it especially powerful during new beginnings and transitions.
affirmation: I flow with the cycles of life and trust my inner knowing.

name: Obsidian
description: Volcanic glass formed from rapidly cooled lava, obsidian is a powerful stone of truth and protection. It exposes flaws, weaknesses, and blockages without compromise, acting as a psychic mirror for deep shadow work.
affirmation: I face my shadow with courage and emerge transformed.
cautions: Can bring up intense emotions, so use with grounding stones

name: Selenite
description: Named after the Greek goddess of the moon, Selene, this translucent crystal carries a high vibration that cleanses and charges other stones. Selenite opens the crown chakra and connects the user to angelic guidance and higher consciousness.
affirmation: I am filled with divine light and clarity.
cautions: Do not place in water, as selenite dissolves
Very soft and scratches easily

name: Tiger's Eye
description: A chatoyant gemstone with golden-brown bands that shimmer like a cat's eye. Tiger's eye combines earth energy with sun energy, promoting courage, willpower, and practical decision-making grounded in clear perception.
affirmation: I act with courage, confidence, and clear vision.

name: Lapis Lazuli
description: A deep blue metamorphic rock prized since antiquity for its intense color and golden pyrite inclusions. Lapis lazuli activates the higher mind, enhances intellectual ability, and stimulates the desire for truth and understanding.
healing_properties: Supports the throat and vocal cords
affirmation: I speak my truth with wisdom and clarity.
cautions: Avoid prolonged contact with water

name: Malachite
description: A striking green stone with swirling bands that has been used for thousands of years as a talisman of transformation. Malachite absorbs negative energy, draws out impurities, and guards against radiation and environmental pollutants.
affirmation: I embrace positive transformation and release what no longer serves me.
cautions: Do not place in water, as it releases toxic copper compounds
Handle polished form only; raw malachite dust is toxic

name: Carnelian
description: A warm, vibrant stone ranging from pale orange to deep reddish-brown that has been worn as a talisman of courage since ancient Egypt. Carnelian stimulates creativity, vitality, and the drive to take bold action.
affirmation: I am bold, creative, and full of vital energy.

name: Fluorite
description: A highly protective and stabilizing stone that comes in a rainbow of colors, most commonly purple and green. Fluorite is excellent for clearing mental fog, enhancing focus, and organizing chaotic thoughts into structured patterns.
healing_properties: Relieves symptoms of colds and flu
affirmation: My mind is clear, focused, and organized.
cautions: Do not place in water, as some varieties contain fluorine
Soft and chips easily

name: Jade
description: Revered for centuries in East Asian cultures as a stone of harmony, prosperity, and longevity. Jade promotes wisdom gathered in tranquility, soothing the mind and encouraging the release of self-imposed limitations.
affirmation: I attract prosperity, harmony, and enduring well-being.

name: Garnet
description: A deep red stone that has been carried as a protective talisman by travelers throughout history. Garnet revitalizes feelings, enhances sensuality, and boosts the survival instinct, bringing courage and hope in crisis.
affirmation: I am filled with passion, vitality, and grounded strength.

name: Smoky Quartz
description: A grounding stone that ranges from light smoky grey to deep brown-black, naturally irradiated within the earth. Smoky quartz gently neutralizes negative energy, relieves fear and depression, and anchors scattered energy back into the body.
healing_properties: Eases muscle cramps and back pain
affirmation: I release what weighs me down and stand grounded in my power.

name: Aventurine
description: A green variety of quartz with a distinctive shimmer caused by tiny mineral inclusions. Known as the stone of opportunity, aventurine is thought to be the luckiest of all crystals, attracting prosperity and encouraging perseverance.
affirmation: I welcome luck, abundance, and new opportunities into my life.

name: Rhodonite
description: A pink stone veined with black manganese oxide that embodies the balance between love and pain. Rhodonite is an emotional healer that nurtures love, encourages forgiveness, and helps process grief and heartbreak.
affirmation: I heal my heart with compassion and move forward with grace.

name: Pyrite
description: An iron sulfide mineral with a brilliant metallic luster that earned it the nickname fool's gold. Pyrite is a powerful stone of willpower and manifestation, shielding against negative energy while encouraging wealth and abundance.
affirmation: I am a magnet for prosperity and I manifest my will with confidence.
cautions: Do not place in water, as the iron content rusts and may release sulfur compounds

name: Amazonite
description: A soothing blue-green stone named after the Amazon River, known for its calming and truth-enhancing properties. Amazonite empowers one to discover personal truths, set firm boundaries, and communicate them with clarity and compassion.
affirmation: I speak my truth with calm confidence and set boundaries with love.
cautions: Avoid prolonged soaking in water

name: Sodalite
description: A rich royal blue stone with white calcite veining that stimulates the mind and deepens meditation. Sodalite brings order and calmness to the mind, encouraging rational thought, objectivity, and truthful expression.
affirmation: I think clearly, speak truthfully, and trust my inner wisdom.

name: Turquoise
description: One of the oldest known protective stones, turquoise has been worn as a sacred talisman across cultures for millennia. It bridges earth and sky, promotes honest communication, and is said to change color to warn of approaching danger.
affirmation: I walk in truth and am protected on all my journeys.
cautions: Porous stone; avoid water, oils, and chemicals

name: Hematite
description: A heavy, metallic stone of iron oxide known for its grounding and protective properties. Hematite strengthens the connection to the earth, dissolves negativity, and promotes endurance, courage, and concentration.
affirmation: I am grounded, centered, and protected by the earth.
cautions: Do not place in water, as the iron content rusts

name: Bloodstone
description: A dark green chalcedony flecked with vivid red spots of iron oxide, giving it its striking appearance. Bloodstone is a stone of courage and vitality that heightens intuition, increases creativity, and supports the body's natural healing processes.
healing_properties: Aids detoxification of liver and kidneys
affirmation: I carry the strength of the earth and the courage of my ancestors.

name: Celestite
description: A pale blue crystal with a gentle, uplifting energy that connects to the angelic realm and higher dimensions. Celestite promotes peace, clarity of speech, and divine communication, making it ideal for prayer and meditation.
affirmation: I am at peace and open to messages from the divine.
cautions: Very fragile, so handle gently
Fades in direct sunlight

name: Chrysocolla
description: A vibrant blue-green stone that resonates with the energies of empowerment, communication, and goddess energy. Chrysocolla calms, cleanses, and re-energizes all the chakras, teaching that silence and true wisdom come from within.
affirmation: I express myself with wisdom, calm, and authentic power.
cautions: Do not place in water, as it is soft and porous

name: Kunzite
description: A delicate pink to lilac crystal that radiates pure love and spiritual devotion. Kunzite opens the heart to receive divine love, eases emotional stress, and helps dissolve the walls built around a wounded heart.
affirmation: I open my heart to love and let go of old pain.
cautions: Fades quickly in direct sunlight, so store in darkness

name: Lepidolite
description: A lilac or lavender mica-rich stone that naturally contains lithium, giving it profound calming properties. Lepidolite is the stone of transition, helping to restructure old patterns and encouraging independence and inner peace.
affirmation: I navigate change with grace and find peace within.
cautions: Do not place in water, as it contains lithium and is very soft

name: Black Onyx
description: A solid, grounding black stone of inner strength and self-mastery. Black onyx provides support during difficult times, absorbs and transforms negative energy, and helps develop emotional and physical stamina.
affirmation: I stand strong in my power and master my own destiny.

name: Aquamarine
description: A serene blue-green beryl crystal that evokes the calming energy of the sea. Aquamarine is a stone of courage and clear communication that soothes fears, sharpens intellect, and protects travelers on water.
healing_properties: Soothes sore throats and thyroid issues
affirmation: I flow with life's currents and speak with gentle courage.

name: Prehnite
description: A gentle green stone known as the healer's healer, prehnite enhances precognition and inner knowing. It connects the heart with the will, encouraging living in the present moment and decluttering possessions and emotional baggage.
affirmation: I trust my inner knowing and release what I no longer need.

name: Unakite
description: A mottled green and pink stone that combines epidote and feldspar in a gentle but powerful partnership. Unakite supports emotional healing by gently releasing conditions that inhibit growth, helping to integrate past experiences.
affirmation: I gently heal the past and grow with patience and love.

name: Howlite
description: A white stone with grey veining that looks like marble and is renowned for its calming energy. Howlite stills the mind, reduces anxiety and insomnia, and is an excellent stone for meditation and accessing past lives.
healing_properties: Supports calcium balance and bone health
affirmation: I am calm, patient, and at peace with the present moment.
cautions: Porous; avoid prolonged soaking in water

name: Kyanite
description: A striking blue blade-like crystal that never accumulates negative energy, making it one of the few stones that never needs cleansing. Kyanite instantly aligns all chakras, bridges communication gaps, and stimulates psychic abilities.
healing_properties: Aids the muscular and neurological system
affirmation: I am aligned, open, and communicating with clarity.
cautions: Very fragile along cleavage planes, so handle with care

name: Iolite
description: A violet-blue stone once used by Viking navigators as a natural polarizing lens to find the sun on cloudy days. Iolite is a vision stone that activates the third eye, supports astral travel, and illuminates the path of self-discovery.
affirmation: I see clearly the path before me and trust my inner compass.

name: Sunstone
description: A joyful stone of light and leadership with a sparkling metallic inclusions that catch the sun. Sunstone restores joy to life, encourages independence and originality, and carries the regenerative power of the sun.
affirmation: I shine with my own light and lead with joyful confidence.

name: Moldavite
description: A rare olive-green tektite formed by a meteorite impact approximately 15 million years ago. Moldavite carries an intense frequency that accelerates spiritual evolution, catalyzes profound life changes, and activates all chakras.
healing_properties: Aids in identifying root causes of illness
affirmation: I welcome rapid transformation and trust the process of evolution.
cautions: Can cause intense reactions, so use gradually
Widely counterfeited, so verify authenticity

name: Agate
description: A banded variety of chalcedony known for its stabilizing and strengthening influence. Agate harmonizes yin and yang, soothes and calms the mind, and builds self-confidence through gentle, sustained energy.
affirmation: I am balanced, stable, and centered in harmony.

name: Amber
description: Not technically a crystal but fossilized tree resin millions of years old, carrying the warmth and ancient wisdom of the earth. Amber absorbs pain and negative energy, cleanses the environment, and stimulates the body's natural healing mechanisms.
affirmation: I carry the warmth of ancient wisdom and radiate healing light.
cautions: Dissolves in salt water
Burns easily, so do not expose to flame

name: Charoite
description: A rare purple stone found only in Siberia with swirling patterns of lavender, violet, and white. Charoite is a stone of transformation that transmutes negative emotions into positive ones and connects the heart to the crown.
affirmation: I transmute fear into love and embrace my highest purpose.

name: Tanzanite
description: A rare blue-violet variety of zoisite found only near Mount Kilimanjaro, prized for its extraordinary color and rarity. Tanzanite stimulates the throat, third eye, and crown chakras together, facilitating higher consciousness and spiritual communication.
healing_properties: Detoxifies and supports recovery from excess
affirmation: I connect to higher wisdom and express my spiritual truth.
cautions: Relatively fragile; avoid ultrasonic cleaning and hard impacts

name: Opal
description: A mesmerizing stone of fire and water that diffracts light into a play of rainbow colors. Opal amplifies emotions and traits, enhances cosmic consciousness, and stimulates originality, creativity, and dynamic expression.
affirmation: I embrace the full spectrum of my emotions and creative power.
cautions: Porous and fragile; avoid water and extreme temperature changes

name: Peridot
description: A vivid olive-green gem born of volcanic fire, sometimes called the evening emerald for its luminous glow under lamplight. Peridot alleviates jealousy, resentment, and spite, opens the heart to joy, and attracts love and abundance.
affirmation: I release old grudges and open my heart to joy and abundance.

name: Spirit Quartz
description: A quartz crystal encrusted with hundreds of tiny crystal points radiating outward in all directions. Spirit quartz harmonizes group energy, promotes collective rather than selfish purpose, and facilitates the transition of a loved one who has passed.
affirmation: I am connected to my community and serve the greater good.

name: Red Jasper
description: A rich, earthy red stone of endurance and nurturing energy. Red jasper is a stone of empowerment that brings the courage to face problems, stimulates passion for life, and provides a steady, grounding energy.
affirmation: I am grounded, strong, and full of vital energy.

name: Larimar
description: A rare blue stone found only in the Dominican Republic, created by volcanic activity. Larimar radiates peace and love, connects to earth goddess energy, and soothes emotional extremes with its cooling, serene vibration.
healing_properties: Dissolves energy blockages in the chest and throat
affirmation: I radiate peace, love, and the healing energy of the sea.
cautions: Fades in direct sunlight
Avoid prolonged contact with water

name: Rhodochrosite
description: A striking pink and white banded stone known as the stone of the compassionate heart. Rhodochrosite gently brings repressed emotions to the surface for healing, encourages self-love, and expands consciousness through emotional release.
affirmation: I love myself deeply and allow my heart to heal fully.
cautions: Soft and fragile; avoid water and rough handling

name: Shungite
description: An ancient black carbon-based stone from Russia, over two billion years old, containing rare fullerenes. Shungite is renowned for its powerful shielding properties against electromagnetic radiation and its ability to purify water and energy.
affirmation: I am shielded from harmful energies and grounded in ancient strength.
cautions: Raw shungite can leave black residue, so handle with care

name: Apophyllite
description: A high-vibration crystal known for its clear, pyramidal formations and brilliant sparkle. Apophyllite creates a conscious connection between the physical and spiritual realms, reducing anxiety and promoting deep meditation.
affirmation: I connect to the spiritual realm with ease and clarity.
cautions: Very fragile; handle gently and keep away from water

name: Aragonite
description: An earthy, grounding stone that forms in star-like clusters and radiates energy in all directions. Aragonite is a powerful earth healer that deepens the connection to the planet, calms nerves, and encourages patience and responsibility.
healing_properties: Supports bone healing and calcium absorption
affirmation: I am deeply connected to the earth and patient in my growth.
cautions: Do not place in water, as it dissolves in acidic solutions

name: Azurite
description: A deep blue copper mineral prized since ancient Egypt for its vivid color and connection to the heavens. Azurite stimulates the third eye, enhances intuition and psychic awareness, and dissolves energy blockages caused by fear and indecision.
healing_properties: Supports brain and nervous system health
affirmation: I see beyond illusion and trust my inner vision.
cautions: Do not place in water, as it contains copper
Fragile; handle gently

name: Dalmatian Jasper
description: A playful cream and black spotted stone that rekindles the child within and promotes joy and lightheartedness. Dalmatian jasper breaks down barriers of over-analysis, encourages loyalty, and helps transform negative thinking into positive energy.
affirmation: I embrace joy, play, and the wonder of being alive.

name: Green Calcite
description: A soft green stone with a gentle, renewing energy that dissolves rigid beliefs and old patterns. Green calcite opens and heals the heart chakra, releases stagnant energy, and encourages the ability to see situations with fresh eyes.
affirmation: I release stagnant energy and renew my heart with fresh hope.
cautions: Do not place in water, as calcite is water-soluble
Very soft and scratches easily

name: Septarian
description: A unique combination of calcite, aragonite, and limestone formed in ancient sea beds. Septarian is a nurturing stone of public speaking and communication that brings calming, grounding energy while enhancing confidence in group settings.
healing_properties: Reduces muscle spasms and night twitches
affirmation: I communicate with confidence, clarity, and nurturing authority.
cautions: Avoid prolonged contact with water due to calcite content

name: Ocean Jasper
description: A rare orbicular jasper found only on the coast of Madagascar during low tide. Ocean jasper carries the rhythmic energy of the tides, encouraging patience, joyful acceptance, and the release of emotional attachments that no longer serve growth.
affirmation: I flow with life's rhythms and find joy in every wave of change.

name: Chrysoprase
description: A vivid apple-green chalcedony that promotes optimism, joy, and a deep sense of contentment. Chrysoprase heals the heart of codependency and self-destructive emotional patterns, encouraging independence and forgiveness.
affirmation: I am whole, independent, and open to joyful new beginnings.
cautions: Fades in prolonged direct sunlight

name: Moss Agate
description: A translucent agate with green, moss-like dendritic inclusions that embody the spirit of nature. Moss agate is a stone of new beginnings, abundance, and growth, deeply connected to plant life and the rhythms of agriculture.
affirmation: I grow steadily toward abundance and honor the natural world.

name: Tourmalinated Quartz
description: Clear quartz shot through with needles of black tourmaline, combining the amplifying power of quartz with the protective grounding of tourmaline. This stone effectively grounds negative energy while maintaining a high vibration.
healing_properties: Harmonizes the meridians and subtle bodies
affirmation: I am grounded in protection while amplifying my highest vibration.

name: Lemon Quartz
description: A bright, sunny yellow quartz that carries optimistic and creative energy. Lemon quartz reduces anxiety, aids concentration during study, and helps filter out distractions to bring focus and clarity to the mind.
affirmation: I think clearly, create freely, and radiate optimism.

name: Apache Tear
description: A small, rounded form of black obsidian associated with a legend of Apache warriors. Apache tears gently absorb grief, provide comfort during mourning, and offer protection while supporting the slow, natural process of emotional healing.
affirmation: I honor my grief, release my pain, and trust in healing.

name: Angelite
description: A soft blue-grey stone compressed from celestite over millions of years, carrying angelic vibrations. Angelite enhances telepathic communication, promotes compassion and understanding, and creates a deep sense of peace and brotherhood.
affirmation: I am guided by angels and speak with compassion.
cautions: Do not place in water, as it reverts to gypsum

name: Serpentine
description: A green stone named for its resemblance to the skin of a serpent, long used as a talisman against venom and sorcery. Serpentine aids meditation, stimulates kundalini energy, and helps retrieve wisdom from past lives.
affirmation: I awaken my inner serpent and rise through transformation.
cautions: Some varieties may contain asbestos, so use polished specimens only

name: Danburite
description: A high-vibration clear to pale pink crystal that facilitates deep change and emotional healing from the angelic realm. Danburite carries a pure vibration that brings serenity, promotes lucid dreaming, and eases the transition at end of life.
affirmation: I am surrounded by angelic love and divine serenity.

name: Fire Agate
description: A rare brownish-red agate with an iridescent play of color caused by layers of iron oxide. Fire agate carries a deep calming energy that builds a protective shield around the body and returns ill-wishing to its source.
affirmation: I am protected by sacred fire and move through life with passion.
